creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:

Author: hrs
Date: Tue Jan  3 20:00:31 UTC 2017
New revision: 430517
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/430517

Log:
  - Enable dbopen() in DB 1.85 even if !BDB because libhdb with
    no backend is very confusing.

  - Fix build when !BDB[*]
